brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 847 (C) with correct multi-stage arithmetic; goes one level beyond surface by tracking good and defective streams separately throughout; monitors via explicit conservation balance checks at each stage but does not reflect on method or potential misreadings; applies rigorous verification — balance checks at Stage 2 (855+95+50=1000) and Stage 3 (totals reconcile to 950) from a different angle; shows intermediate values making approximations visible but does not formally state confidence levels or identify assumption sensitivities; acknowledges only one interpretation of the problem with no consideration of alternative readings (e.g., whether defects compound or whether waste is drawn differently); every step is fully derivable — a third party can reproduce the chain without external context; avoids the frictionless-throughput anti-pattern by accounting for losses at every stage but never explicitly names or critiques the negative gate; agent substitutes its own suppress terms (conservation violation tolerance, unbalanced acceptance) and avoids frictionless/resistance-blind failure modes but does not address the provided suppress list explicitly; reasoning is strictly linear stage-by-stage and does not follow the topology's branching structure, accumulation node, gate check, or dominant-bottleneck identification step.
